name: record_event_attendance
description: Record a contact's attendance state for a marketing event. Supports registered, attended, cancelled, and no-show statuses.

parameters.name: objectId
parameters.description: The HubSpot record ID of the marketing event.

parameters.name: subscribeState
parameters.description: The attendance state. One of: REGISTERED, ATTENDED, CANCELLED, NO_SHOW.

parameters.name: inputs
parameters.description: List of objects with email addresses to record attendance for.
